allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3000 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Not ready yet: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(foreach \($i in 1..3\) { $t = Measure-Command { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3000 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60 | Out-Null }; "Home request $i : $\([int]$t.TotalMilliseconds\) ms" })

PowerShell(npx tsx -e "import {PrismaClient} from '@prisma/client'; const p=new PrismaClient\(\); \(async\(\)=>{ for\(let i=0;i<3;i++\){const t=Date.now\(\); await p.platformSettings.findUnique\({where:{id:'singleton'}}\); console.log\('query '+i+': '+\(Date.now\(\)-t\)+'ms'\);} await p.$disconnect\(\);}\)\(\)")

PowerShell(npx tsx -e "import {PrismaClient} from '@prisma/client'; const p=new PrismaClient\(\); \(async\(\)=>{ for\(let i=0;i<3;i++\){const t=Date.now\(\); await p.platformSettings.findUnique\({where:{id:'singleton'}}\); console.log\('query '+i+': '+\(Date.now\(\)-t\)+'ms'\);} await p.`$disconnect\(\);}\)\(\)")

PowerShell(try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3001 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60 | Out-Null } catch {}; foreach \($i in 1..4\) { $t = Measure-Command { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3001 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60 | Out-Null }; "PROD home request $i : $\([int]$t.TotalMilliseconds\) ms" })

PowerShell(npx tsx -e "import {PrismaClient} from '@prisma/client'; const p=new PrismaClient\(\); \(async\(\)=>{ const r=await p.listing.updateMany\({where:{checkInTime:null}, data:{checkInTime:'3:00 PM', checkOutTime:'11:00 AM', houseRules:'No smoking\\nNo parties or events\\nQuiet hours after 10:00 PM'}}\); console.log\('updated listings:', r.count\); await p.`$disconnect\(\);}\)\(\)")

PowerShell(npx tsx scripts/update-cancellation.ts; Remove-Item -Force "c:\\Users\\prchandra\\workspace_personal\\mybnb\\scripts\\update-cancellation.ts"; if \(\(Get-ChildItem "c:\\Users\\prchandra\\workspace_personal\\mybnb\\scripts" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count -eq 0\) { Remove-Item -Force "c:\\Users\\prchandra\\workspace_personal\\mybnb\\scripts" })

PowerShell(npx tsx -e "import {PrismaClient} from '@prisma/client'; const p=new PrismaClient\(\); \(async\(\)=>{const l=await p.listing.findUnique\({where:{id:'cmqjvbip50003uib8zh3h2w71'},select:{id:true,status:true,hostId:true}}\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(l\)\); await p.`$disconnect\(\);}\)\(\)" 2>$null)

PowerShell(try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/listings/cmqjvbip50003uib8zh3h2w71" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "status $\($resp.StatusCode\)"; "contains listing title 'hsj': $\([bool]\($resp.Content -match 'hsj'\)\)"; "contains 'not found'/404: $\([bool]\($resp.Content -match 'not found|could not|404|Preview'\)\)" } catch { "threw: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" })
